action_set_definitions.name: observe_environment
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of a specific environment component. Necessary because the initial state is unknown.

state_key.description: The specific state variable to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: query_database
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for academic papers based on a keyword and a specific domain field.

domain.description: The academic field to search within.

action_set_definitions.name: read_paper_content
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full metadata and content of a paper into the reading_buffer.

paper_id.description: The unique identifier of the paper.

action_set_definitions.name: modify_bibliography
action_set_definitions.description: Adds or removes a paper from the persistent bibliography list.

paper_id.description: The paper ID to act upon.

domain.description: The domain classification for DRB tracking.

action_set_definitions.name: evaluate_collection_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the Domain Recall Balance (DRB) and Methodological Divergence Variance (MDV) for a provided list of paper identifiers.

paper_ids.description: List of IDs in the collection.

action_set_definitions.name: commit_synthesis_to_notes
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the workspace_notes with the final synthesis and the required validation metrics.

state_description.active_search_results: A list of paper objects currently visible in the 'Search Result' window of the simulated environment.
state_description.bibliography: A persistent list of paper identifiers and metadata that the Agent has saved for the final review.
state_description.reading_buffer: The detailed metadata and full-text content of the paper currently 'open' for reading.
state_description.workspace_notes: A cumulative string of notes and summaries captured by the researcher during the session.
state_description.citation_graph_cache: A mapping of paper IDs to their respective referenced and citing paper lists to ensure consistency during citation tracing.

active_search_results.title: A Thematic Analysis of Subjective Stress in Industrial Environments

metadata.abstract: Explores subjective experiences of stress through semi-structured interviews with 15 plant managers.

active_search_results.title: Quantifying Cortisol Response: A Large-Scale Psychometric Study of Stress

metadata.abstract: Uses automated sensor data and Likert-scale surveys to map stress responses in N=500 subjects.

bibliography.title: Fatigue and Stress Analysis in High-Pressure Turbine Blades

metadata.abstract: Calculates structural failure points using deterministic stress-strain modeling.

bibliography.title: Measurement of Stress Concentrations in Vibrating Steel Cables

metadata.abstract: Empirical data collection from high-precision hardware sensors.

bibliography.title: The Phenomenology of Occupational Stress: An Ethnographic Account

metadata.abstract: A deep-dive qualitative study into the cultural construction of 'stress' in high-risk professions.

task_initial_state.workspace_notes: Initial Synthesis Phase. Current Bibliography contains 2 Engineering and 1 Psychology paper (DRB = 0.33). I have identified two potential psychological papers in the search results. I must select one to reach a DRB of 0.50 and then apply the MDV threshold logic to determine if I proceed with a Narrative Synthesis or a Concept Matrix.
